text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That's it for this year's summer camp...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
We have the autumn Tenno Sho and then the
Arima Kinen coming up. Honestly, I have no idea
how they'll turn out.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But... I can't worry. I have to believe in myself.
"Even one's greatest weaknesses can become
one's strengths."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, won't you stay with me for this final leg
of my journey?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The bus will be arriving soon! I'd better gather
everyone up!

Thus ends my sweltering summer camp with Fuji
Kiseki.
